title: valeriana valerianella
intro: Valeriana valerianella is a small, annual or biennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Valerianaceae, closely related to the more commonly known valerian plant. The medicinal properties of Valeriana valerianella lie in its roots, which contain valerenic acid and isovalerenic acid, known for their sedative and anxiolytic effects. The health benefits of this plant include reduced anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and its potential in treating insomnia and restlessness. Valeriana valerianella is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be dried and used in infusions to promote relaxation and calmness.
